name: Psy-Bell Mew (Divine Anomaly)
description: A divine anomaly resulting from the resonance between Mew's primordial genome and Flittle's rhythmic frequencies. It exists as a playful echo of the multiversal core.
originLore: Emerging from the harmonic overlap of the first ancestor and the rhythmic void. Psy-Bell Mew does not inhabit space so much as it dances through the vibrations of existence, its frilled bells chiming with the music of the spheres.

lore.celestialConcordance: Psy-Bell Mew serves as the cosmic jester and messenger, turning the static of the abyss into a symphony of light and bubbles.

quantumResonators.name: Genesis Chiming
quantumResonators.description: A rhythmic psychic pulse that restores reality to its base state, cleansing all status anomalies.

quantumResonators.name: Ethereal Bubble
quantumResonators.description: Trap threats within a pocket dimension of pure joy, rendering them harmless until the resonance fades.
